the current treatments, novel approaches such as antibody-drug conjugation

evidence.source_title: Breast cancer: presentation, investigation and management.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 35243878. 2022/02/02 00:00. we present 
the current treatments, novel approaches such as antibody-drug conjugation 
systems (ADCs), nanoparticles (albumin-, metal-, lipid-, polymer-, micelle-based 
nanoparticles), and BCSCs-based therapies. Furthermore, prognostic and 
predictive biomarkers will be discussed also biomarkers that have been applied 
by some tests such as Oncotype DX, Mamm αPrint, and uPA/PAI-1 are regarded as 
suitable prognostic and predictive factors in breast cancer.
